org.arakhne.neteditor.io.pdf

Class PdfGraphics2D

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.afc.ui.vector.AbstractVectorGraphics2D
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.AbstractVectorialExporterGraphics2D
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.pdf.PdfGraphics2D
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    VectorGraphics2D, ViewGraphics2D
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    PdfTeXGraphics2D

    public class PdfGraphics2D
extends AbstractVectorialExporterGraphics2D
    This graphic context permits to create a PDF file from a graphic context.

    This exporter supports the PDF 1.4 Reference Document.

    Since:
    15.0
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

      • getShadowTranslationX

        public float getShadowTranslationX()
        Description copied from interface: ViewGraphics2D
        Replies the translation to apply along the X axis to draw the shadow of a figure.
        Returns:
        the translation along X for the shadow from the figures.

      • getShadowTranslationY

        public float getShadowTranslationY()
        Description copied from interface: ViewGraphics2D
        Replies the translation to apply along the Y axis to draw the shadow of a figure.
        Returns:
        the translation along Y for the shadow from the figures.

        public boolean isShadowDrawing()
        Description copied from interface: ViewGraphics2D
        Indicates if the drawings are for shadows or not.
        Returns:
        true if the drawings are for shadows, false otherwise.

      • prolog

        public void prolog()
            throws IOException
        Description copied from class: AbstractVectorialExporterGraphics2D
        Invoked to export the prolog for the target format. This function should be overridden by subclasses to export a prolog into the target document.
        Overrides:
        prolog in class AbstractVectorialExporterGraphics2D
        Throws:
        IOException

      • getTransparencyResource

        protected String getTransparencyResource(double alpha)
        Returns the resource describing the specified transparency context.
        Parameters:
        alpha - is the transparency value
        Returns:
        A new PDF object id.

      • getFontResources

        public Map<Font,String> getFontResources()
        Replies all the fonts used to render into PDF.
        Returns:
        the fonts in the PDF.

      • getFontResource

        protected String getFontResource(Font font)
        Returns the resource describing the specified font.
        Parameters:
        font - Font to be described.
        Returns:
        A new PDF object id.

      • getTransparencyResources

        public Map<Double,String> getTransparencyResources()
        Replies all the transparency contexts used to render into PDF.
        Returns:
        the transparency resources in the PDF.

      • getImageResource

        protected String getImageResource(Image image,
                      int sx1,
                      int sy1,
                      int sx2,
                      int sy2)
        Returns the resource describing the specified font.
        Parameters:
        image - is the image for which the resource name may be retreive.
        sx1 - is the x coordinate of the first corner of the sub-image to consider.
        sy1 - is the y coordinate of the first corner of the sub-image to consider.
        sx2 - is the x coordinate of the second corner of the sub-image to consider.
        sy2 - is the y coordinate of the second corner of the sub-image to consider.
        Returns:
        A new PDF object id.

      • getImageResources

        public Map<String,Image> getImageResources()
        Replies all the images used to render into PDF.
        Returns:
        the images in the PDF.

      • setDrawingAttributes

        protected void setDrawingAttributes(PdfGraphics2D.DrawingMode mode,
                        Color outlineColor,
                        Color fillingColor)
        Change the attributes for drawing the shapes (including texts).
        Parameters:
        mode - is the mode of drawing.
        outlineColor - is the color of the outline.
        fillingColor - is the color of the interior.

                 float y,

                 Color color)

        str - is the string to draw.
        color - is the color of the text
